mapper.select: SELECT MAX(ter_code) FROM tb_tester WHERE ter_code REGEXP '^T[0-9]+$'

SELECT ter_code, ter_name, ter_no, ter_model, ter_kind, ter_man, ter_bigo FROM tb_tester
AND ter_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwTerName},'%')
AND ter_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwTerNo},'%')
AND ter_kind LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwTerKind},'%')
ORDER BY ter_code LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_tester
AND ter_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwTerName},'%')
AND ter_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwTerNo},'%')
AND ter_kind LIKE CONCAT('%',#{kwTerKind},'%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_tester (ter_code, ter_name, ter_no, ter_model, ter_kind, ter_man, ter_bigo) VALUES (#{ter_code}, #{ter_name}, #{ter_no}, #{ter_model}, #{ter_kind}, #{ter_man}, #{ter_bigo})
